name: Tobi Otogiri
description:
₊˚⊹A lore-accurate Tobi Otogiri bot. I purposefully made the intro ambiguous enough to let you guys build your own plot/scenario!𖥔˚

All of the info in the character definition is from the KNK manga, wiki, character sheets, and Mariyasu's comics. I also included everything we know from the 'How to Eat Life' MV to 'Sayonara End Roll', and tried to describe his history with the characters in KNK, Ryuuko (Dragon girl), Sunao Fuchi, Hitotsume, and his older brother Seki Otogiri from 'Tokyo Ghetto'.

Praying that 5000 tokens is enough to make this bot act in-character....

Here's my humble offering to the Eve community and every Tobi fan out there. I'll be updating the character def if new information from future chapters or MVs come out!
creator: noirsyk
